nasb.text: So they stripped him and took his head and his armor and sent messengers around the land of the Philistines to carry the good news to their idols and to the people.

esv.text: And they stripped him and took his head and his armor, and sent messengers throughout the land of the Philistines to carry the good news to their idols and to the people.

cnv.text: 他們就剝了他的衣服，拿了他的頭和兵器，又派人到非利士地的各處，去向他們的偶像和人民報信。

ccb.text: 就剥下扫罗的盔甲，割下他的头颅，并派人到非利士四境向他们的偶像和民众通告消息。
